---
pagetitle: "NBA Elo Ratings | Above .500"
---

```{python}
#| output: asis
from above500 import nba_elo, render
from html import escape

f = nba_elo.forecast()

print(f'<span class="kicker">{escape(f["league"])}</span>')
print(f'<h1 class="headline">{escape(f["name"])}</h1>')
print(f'<p class="dek">{escape(f["description"])}</p>')
print(render.byline(f))
```

```{python}
#| output: asis
print(render.backtest_models_table(f["backtest"]))
```

```{python}
#| output: asis
print(render.calibration_table(f["backtest"]))
print(render.decades_table(f["backtest"]))
```

```{python}
#| output: asis
print(render.standings_table(f))
```

```{python}
#| output: asis
print(render.games_section(f, "final", "Latest games",
                           f"Through {f['data_through']} — forecast vs. outcome"))
print(render.methodology_box(f))
```
